Struggling to Stand Out from the Crowd?

Many talented beauty professionals struggle to gain real visibility, often pouring time and money into platforms that don't bring the right clients. It's frustrating when you know your services are exceptional – yet you feel overlooked, undervalued, or hidden in the noise.

The Beauty Destination Connecting Your Business to Women Everywhere

Glamorique was created to help you stand apart. As a trusted luxury beauty and wellness platform, we're here to help businesses like yours showcase your brand, connect with women, and attract loyal clients.

Join Glamorique in 3 Simple Steps

Help new clients find you in 3 simple steps — without chasing leads.

Get 2 Months for Free
Step 1

Create Your Profile

Create your professional business profile in minutes. Add your key details so clients can easily understand who you are and what you offer.

Step 2

List Your Services

Select your specialist categories and showcase your services, allowing the right beauty clients to find you quickly and easily.

Step 3

Start Receiving Enquiries

Connect with women actively searching for trusted beauty professionals and start receiving direct enquiries through the platform.

Gold Membership – 60-Day Free Trial

New members receive 60 days of full access to the Gold Membership, completely free. After the 60-day free trial, Gold Membership is $245 per month, unless a Founder upgrade option is selected within the first 30 days.

Limited Time Offer

Founder's Upgrade Incentives

Available only in your first 30 days

Option 1

Monthly Founder Rate

$145per month
  • Locked in for 12 months
  • Save $100 per month off the standard Gold rate

Annual Founder Rate

$1,200for 12 months

  • Save more than 55% compared to the standard Gold rate
